panels.description: Medium shot: Jonathan sits up suddenly in bed, eyes wide and dazed. His wife, Mina, recoil from him, covering her face with trembling hands, body shaking violently under the bedsheets. Victorian bedroom, dim candle lighting, dramatic shadows.

bubbles.text: He seemed dazed for a few seconds, and then full consciousness burst upon him.

panels.description: Medium close-up: Jonathan looking frantically at Dr. Seward and Van Helsing, then at Mina, his expression a mix of confusion and horror as he notices blood stains. Dark, tense room atmosphere.

bubbles.text: In God's name what does this mean? Mina, what does that blood mean?

panels.description: Medium shot: Jonathan kneeling on the edge of the bed, grabbing his clothes, face set in grim determination. Van Helsing standing nearby, protective.

bubbles.text: Tell me all! Guard her while I look for him!

panels.description: Close-up: Van Helsing holding up a small golden crucifix before a terrified Mina. His expression is calm and authoritative. Low key lighting highlighting the crucifix.

bubbles.text: Do not fear. Whilst this is close to you, no foul thing can approach.

panels.description: Medium shot: Mina weeping, Jonathan holding her tightly to his chest. High contrast, emotional reunion. The background shows the concerned faces of the two doctors.

bubbles.text: Unclean! I must touch him no more.
Nonsense, Mina. I would not hear it of you.
